name: Fesenmyer Law Offices, LLC
description_short: Ohio-based bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings, debt relief, and foreclosure defense across Cincinnati, Columbus, and Dayton.
description_long:
Fesenmyer Law Offices, LLC is a debt-relief law practice operating across central and southwestern Ohio with physical offices in Cincinnati, Columbus, and Dayton. The firm was founded to serve clients facing overwhelming debt and financial hardship, offering legal guidance through federal bankruptcy processes. The firm emphasizes accessibility through multiple office locations and a toll-free phone number (1-877-654-LAWS), indicating an intent to serve a broad regional clientele.

The firm provides comprehensive bankruptcy services including Chapter 7 liquidation bankruptcy, Chapter 13 debt reorganization plans, creditor harassment cessation, foreclosure defense, and debt settlement negotiations. They also address specialized bankruptcy scenarios involving student loans, tax debt, divorce-related debts, wage garnishment, and vehicle repossessions. All new clients receive a free consultation and personalized case evaluation to determine the most appropriate debt-relief strategy.

The firm's stated differentiators are an attorney with "decades of legal experience and financial knowledge" who specializes exclusively in bankruptcy law, combined with a service model emphasizing patience, compassion, and individualized attention. They position themselves as simplifying complex federal bankruptcy law for clients without financial or legal expertise, handling all document preparation, court filing, and creditor communication.

As a solo or small bankruptcy practice, the firm's capacity may be limited compared to larger regional firms. There is no public information regarding attorney credentials, bar standing, client reviews, or fee structures beyond the free initial consultation offer. Success rates, case outcomes, and client testimonials are not provided on the website.
pros: Free initial consultation and personalized case evaluation for all prospective clients
Multiple office locations (Cincinnati, Columbus, Dayton) reducing travel burden for central/southwestern Ohio residents
Toll-free phone line (1-877-654-LAWS) providing accessible contact across service area
Attorney specialization exclusively in bankruptcy law with stated decades of legal experience
Comprehensive service scope covering Chapter 7, Chapter 13, foreclosure defense, and specialized debt scenarios (student loans, tax debt, wage garnishment)
Full-service representation including document preparation, court filing, and creditor communication handling
Explicit commitment to reducing client stress through proactive communication and clear legal guidance
cons: No published fee schedule or pricing information beyond offering free consultation
No client reviews, testimonials, or case outcome data available on website
Attorney credentials, bar standing, and disciplinary history not verifiable from provided website content
Limited information on response times, case processing timelines, or service level agreements
No indication of whether the firm handles bankruptcy filings in states outside Ohio
best_for: Ohio residents in Cincinnati, Columbus, or Dayton areas facing Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy
Homeowners in foreclosure proceedings seeking legal defense and debt relief simultaneously
Individuals with wage garnishment or creditor lawsuits requiring immediate legal intervention
Those with complicated debt situations involving student loans, tax debt, or divorce-related liabilities
diagnosis: Best for Ohio residents in the Cincinnati, Columbus, or Dayton areas seeking specialized bankruptcy representation, particularly those facing foreclosure, wage garnishment, or complex debt situations. Primary caveat: no verifiable information on attorney qualifications, fee structure, or client outcomes is publicly available—prospective clients should request documentation of bar standing and request references during the free consultation before engagement.
services: Chapter 13 Bankruptcy filing and debt reorganization
Foreclosure defense and mortgage holder representation
Creditor harassment cessation and collections lawsuit defense
Student loan debt handling in bankruptcy context
